chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1030 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on Misc. No.4267/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 and 2 3. For orders on Misc. No.4268/2026 (Exemption Application) 4. For hearing of main case 24.02.2026 Mr. Ajab Khan Khattak, Advocate for the petitioner ---------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person namely Imran S/o Sultan Khan has been surfaced, therefore, he does press instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
